description: Stunningly renovated townhome in sought-after Nahanee Woods. Offering 3 bdrms, 3 baths, and over 1,800 sq ft on two levels, including a spacious main-floor primary bdrm. The foyer opens to an open-concept living & dining area w/ vaulted ceilings, gas fp, & white oak stairs w/ metal & glass railings. Tile flooring w/ radiant in-floor heating spans the main level, complemented by a recent heat pump & A/C upgrade. The open kitchen features sleek white cabinetry, quartz counters, a large island, & Thermador appliances. A flex space w/ a 2nd gas fp opens to a private west-facing deck. The main-floor primary retreat incl. bay windows, WIC, & renovated 5-pce ensuite. Upstairs are 2 generous bedrooms, a 4-piece bath, and flexible landing. Quietly located near parks, shopping, recreation, & trails.
